title: Nurse Shift Skill Mix Assignment
description: A hospital-operations and compliance workflow that enforces control checks while allocating operational resources and closing governance loops. Focus case: nurse shift skill mix assignment.
assumptions: Each shift_slot (T1) represents one staffing position and must be individually validated before finalization.
Nurse availability is exclusive: when a nurse_candidate is assigned to a slot their availability flag is cleared until unassignment.
Approval documents and trainer resources are consumable and must be reserved for the slot prior to finalization.
risks: Resource contention: orientation sessions, trainers, or approval documents may be scarce, causing assignment delays.
Missing or incorrect credential verification could lead to non-compliant assignments if checks are bypassed.
Inter-shift dependencies (day/night) may block finalization if approvals are not properly linked across shift subtypes.
